# Timeline

A serverless, Twitter-style minimal personal timeline app built on Cloudflare Workers.

**Generated by GLM-5.2 Max.**

## Stack

- **Backend:** TypeScript, Cloudflare Workers, D1 (database), R2 (image storage)
- **Frontend:** HTML / CSS / Vanilla JS

## Features

- Markdown-based posts with infinite scroll
- Image hosting with WebP conversion
- Browser-side Markdown rendering
- Shortcodes: `{{ sensitive }}`, `{{ post:<id> }}`, `{{ yt:<video_id> }}`, `{{ bl:<bv_id> }}`, `{{ x:<post_id> }}`
- Token-protected management page for create/edit/delete

## Setup

[![Deploy to Cloudflare](https://deploy.workers.cloudflare.com/button)](https://deploy.workers.cloudflare.com/?url=https://github.com/plaintext-stream/timeline)

1. Install dependencies:
   ```
   npm install
   ```
2. Create a Cloudflare D1 database and R2 bucket, then configure bindings in `wrangler.jsonc`.
3. Set the required secret:
   ```
   npx wrangler secret put TIMELINE_ROOT_TOKEN
   ```

## Commands

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `npm run dev` | Local development |
| `npm run deploy` | Deploy to Cloudflare |
| `npm test` | Run tests (Vitest) |
| `npm run lint` | Lint code |
| `npm run format` | Format code |
| `npm run typecheck` | Type-check TypeScript |

## API

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/posts?limit=&cursor=` | No | List posts (pagination) |
| POST | `/api/posts` | Bearer token | Create a post |
| GET | `/api/posts/:id` | No | Get a post |
| PUT | `/api/posts/:id` | Bearer token | Update a post |
| DELETE | `/api/posts/:id` | Bearer token | Delete a post |
| GET | `/api/quote/:id` | No | Get post preview (100 chars) |
| POST | `/api/upload` | Bearer token | Upload an image |
| GET | `/i/:name` | No | Serve an image |
